content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — quid-pro-quo review incentive in paywall: "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!" (App/PaywallView.swift:10)
Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits offering compensation or rewards in exchange for ratings or reviews, and this footnote ties a 5-star review to free Premium time — a textbook incentivized-review violation. Metadata itself is clean (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt), but reviewers do screen in-app UI text. Remove the reward offer and, if you want reviews, use SKStoreReviewController's neutral prompt with no incentive attached.
